response.justification: Over fifteen years of full-stack experience with a strong recent focus on TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB directly matches the primary stack, and current hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling covers the role's rarest requirement. Demonstrated craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development), cloud and Kubernetes experience, and Java exposure round out the profile; the main gaps are framework-specific (no explicit Nest.js or Vitest) and appear easily bridgeable given the depth elsewhere.
strengths: Deep, current TypeScript/Node.js/React experience matching the primary stack
Hands-on AI-agent development (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks) — an explicit and uncommon requirement
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, testing tooling authorship, and architecture experience at scale
concerns: Kotlin absent and Java experience appears dated; testing tools named are D-language rather than Jest/Vitest/Playwright
Significant career time invested in DLang, a niche ecosystem with limited direct transfer to the stack

key_factors.factor: Primary stack match with senior-level depth
Missing Nest.js and listed testing frameworks
